title: Plutarch, Moralia: On the Decline of Oracles
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Decline of Oracles.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Decline of Oracles.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On the Decline of Oracles': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
